_comment: Gateway scorecard snapshot. Scores ★1-5 per the rubric in BENCHMARKS.md. markup = gateway fee on top of provider token cost. self_hosted: compliance/security burden is the operator's; score reflects controls the software provides. Verify live certs before an audit.

gateways.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
gateways.note: SOC 2 II / ISO 27001 / PCI / GDPR; free DLP+PII scan, guardrails, fallback; 100% SLA at Business+.

gateways.name: Portkey (cloud)
gateways.note: SOC 2 II + ISO 27001 + HIPAA + GDPR; 50+ guardrail marketplace, RBAC, SSO, key vault; 99.99% SLA.

gateways.name: Vercel AI Gateway
gateways.note: SOC 2 II + 99.99% SLA (Enterprise); true 0% markup incl. BYOK; ZDR option.

gateways.name: Helicone (cloud)
gateways.note: SOC 2 + HIPAA (Team $799/mo); PII detection, prompt-injection; OSS core enables VPC/self-host.

gateways.name: Requesty
gateways.note: EU residency (Frankfurt) + PII masking + ZDR; SOC 2 Type II still in progress — official security page still shows 'expected Q2 2026', now overdue (re-checked 2026-07-03); not yet Type II.

gateways.name: OpenRouter
gateways.note: 60+ providers, auto-failover, free ZDR, EU region-lock; SOC 2 Type II UNVERIFIED; no public SLA outside enterprise.

gateways.name: Eden AI
gateways.note: France-based, EU-default residency, GDPR-first, no-training; SOC 2 status UNVERIFIED; 99.99% self-reported.

gateways.name: Martian
gateways.note: Airlock model-compliance vetting + cost routing; SOC 2/ISO details UNVERIFIED.

gateways.name: Azure OpenAI
gateways.note: SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / HIPAA-BAA / FedRAMP High; region pinning, ZDR-eligible endpoints; single-vendor.

gateways.name: AWS Bedrock
gateways.note: ISO / SOC / CSA STAR L2 / GDPR / HIPAA / FedRAMP High; ZDR config; multi-model within Bedrock; ~99.9% SLA.

gateways.name: Google Vertex AI
gateways.note: First GenAI platform to FedRAMP High (2025); SOC 2 / ISO / HIPAA-BAA; ZDR config; GCP SLA.

gateways.name: OpenAI (direct)
gateways.note: SOC 2 II, GDPR, HIPAA-BAA, ZDR endpoints; single-vendor = no cross-provider failover; historically incident-prone.

gateways.name: Portkey Gateway (OSS)
gateways.note: Apache-2.0 (Gateway 2.0); guardrails, circuit breakers, MCP OAuth 2.1, fallbacks free to self-hosters; <1ms overhead.

gateways.name: Kong AI Gateway
gateways.note: PII sanitization (20+ categories, 12 langs), AI Prompt Guard, Model Armor guardrails, RBAC; Enterprise carries Kong certs.

gateways.name: Envoy AI Gateway
gateways.note: Built on Envoy; multi-provider routing + MCP gateway w/ OAuth + CEL authz; native K8s/Istio; no semantic cache/budgets.

gateways.name: Bifrost (Maxim)
gateways.note: Go; ~11µs overhead at 5k RPS (vendor benchmark), adaptive LB, cluster mode, 1000+ models; no known CVEs.

gateways.name: TensorZero
gateways.note: Rust; <1ms p99 at 10k+ QPS; routing/retries/fallbacks, schema enforcement, built-in observability. ⚠️ ARCHIVED 2026-06 — repo unmaintained; Apache-2.0 forks only.

gateways.name: Higress
gateways.note: Istio/Envoy AI-native gateway, Wasm plugins (Go/Rust/JS), console; Alibaba-backed, active.

gateways.name: Apache APISIX
gateways.note: ai-proxy / ai-rate-limiting / ai-prompt-guard plugins on mature ASF gateway; no semantic cache / virtual-key budgets / MCP.

gateways.name: LiteLLM
gateways.note: SOC 2 I + ISO (Enterprise); 2 serious 2026 CVEs both fixed in v1.83.7-stable — patch promptly. Weekly releases, healthy.

gateways.name: GPT-Load
gateways.note: Go, MIT, ~6.2k★, v1.4.8 (May 2026); key-pool rotation + encrypted key store + dual auth; proxy-level, not full governance.

gateways.name: new-api
gateways.note: ~38k★, active, but cluster of 2026 CVEs; sandbox, restrict egress, patch aggressively.

gateways.name: one-api
gateways.note: MIT original; maintenance slowed vs forks — new-api is the more active successor. Audit before prod.
